name: text-mark
title: Text Mark
description: Hand drawn text marks: highlight wash, underline, circle, and related annotation kinds.

api.description: Inline hand-drawn emphasis for a word or phrase. Choose a marker wash (highlight), a sketchy baseline (underline), or a scribble oval (circle). Drive visibility with active for scroll or focus. Prefer separate TextMark instances on different phrases when combining a wash and a circle.

groups.title: TextMark
groups.description: Pick one kind for a single mark, or pass layers to stack marks on the same span.

props.name: children
props.description: Text or inline content to annotate.

props.name: active
props.description: When true, draw the annotation. When false, hide it. Use this to sync marks with scroll steps or selection.

props.name: kind
props.description: Annotation shape. highlight is a marker wash. underline is a sketchy baseline under the glyphs. circle is a scribble oval around the phrase. Ignored when layers is set.

props.name: layers
props.description: Ordered stack of annotations on the same span. Prefer separate TextMark nodes on different phrases when a wash and a circle should not share the same words.

props.name: color
props.description: CSS color for the single-kind path. Tokens and color-mix resolve at draw time. Defaults: highlight uses --df-text-mark-yellow, underline and circle use --df-text-mark-blue.

props.name: activeColor
props.description: Optional text color while active. Omit to keep inherited ink over a light wash.

props.name: strokeWidth
props.description: Stroke thickness in CSS pixels for the single-kind path.

props.name: duration
props.description: Draw duration in milliseconds for the single-kind path. Reduced motion sets this to 0.

props.name: iterations
props.description: Extra sketch passes. Higher values look less uniform. Defaults to 3 for underline and circle, 2 for other kinds.

props.name: padding
props.description: Extra space around the glyphs in CSS pixels. Raise this to scale circles and boxes outward. Defaults to 12 for circle, 6 for box, 2 otherwise.

props.name: brackets
props.description: Bracket sides when kind is bracket. Ignored for other kinds.

props.name: multiline
props.description: When true, annotate each visual line of wrapped text. Set false to treat the content as one box.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the host span.

groups.title: TextMarkLayer
groups.description: One entry in the layers array. Same knobs as the single-kind props, scoped to that pass.

props.name: kind
props.description: Annotation shape for this layer.

props.name: color
props.description: CSS color for this layer. Tokens resolve at draw time.

props.name: strokeWidth
props.description: Stroke thickness in CSS pixels for this layer.

props.name: duration
props.description: Draw duration in milliseconds for this layer.

props.name: iterations
props.description: Extra sketch passes for this layer. Raise for a less uniform scribble.

props.name: padding
props.description: Extra space around the glyphs in CSS pixels for this layer.

props.name: brackets
props.description: Bracket sides when this layer kind is bracket.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-text-mark
props.description: Default mark color alias. Points at the yellow wash.

props.name: --df-text-mark-yellow
props.description: Neon yellow green marker wash for highlight (--df-yellow-green-90).

props.name: --df-text-mark-pink
props.description: Pink marker wash for highlight accents.

props.name: --df-text-mark-blue
props.description: Blue stroke for circle and underline.

props.name: --df-text-mark-foreground
props.description: Optional ink override when activeColor is set to this token.
